sidebar.noPoints: Tap the canvas to place points

onboarding.title: How to use
onboarding.step1: Tap the canvas to place points
onboarding.step2: Edit coordinates directly in the list
onboarding.step3: Ortho mode creates right-angle routes automatically
onboarding.step4: Use simulation to preview the machining route

help.title: How to use
help.step1_desc: Tap anywhere on the canvas to place a point. Points connect to form a route.
help.step2_desc: With Ortho mode on, lines snap to horizontal or vertical. Blue = horizontal, green = vertical.
help.step3_desc: Tap a point to select it; drag to move it. Long-press to open a coordinate editor.
help.step4_desc: With 2 or more points, start the simulation to preview the wire route in real time.
help.step5_desc: Tap Undo to reverse the last action. You can undo as many times as needed. Redo restores what you undid.
help.step6_desc: Tap New to save the current route and start fresh. Any past route can be recalled from the history list on the right.
help.step7_desc: Add mode places points on tap. Edit mode lets you pan the canvas by dragging. Switch from the toolbar.
